headline: VERIFY EVERY LICENCE AT SOURCE
subheading: Run defensible GDP bona fide checks that keep falsified medicines out of your chain.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial illustration evoking pharmaceutical supply-chain verification and authenticity. A luminous teal-cyan node at the centre emits a verifying scan beam over a sealed, featureless medicine carton silhouette, while two interlocking supply-chain links bridge a buyer node and a supplier node across a deep navy field. Translucent concentric verification rings and a subtle checkmark-shaped light gleam confirm a matched, authentic record; a faint broken, dimmed link drifts to one side suggesting a rejected counterfeit pathway. Fine glowing connection lines, register-grid motifs and shield-like geometric facets convey scrutiny, trust and traceability. Cool clinical-luxury palette of deep navy and teal-cyan with a single subtle green accent, soft volumetric glow, polished glass reflections, shallow depth of field, premium and uncluttered. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
